Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class EnrollmentCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.EnrollmentCreate
public class EnrollmentCreate extends Object
EnrollmentCreate - An Enrollment represents programs the account may enroll in.

    • principalApproverId

      public String principalApproverId()
      The ULID is associated with the approver of a given enrollment. The approver you create will contain the CRD Number issued to the person by FINRA. As an RIA, you should use the ULID associated with Apex's approver.

    • withPrincipalApproverId

      public EnrollmentCreate withPrincipalApproverId(String principalApproverId)
      The ULID is associated with the approver of a given enrollment. The approver you create will contain the CRD Number issued to the person by FINRA. As an RIA, you should use the ULID associated with Apex's approver.
